steps.name: project-config
steps.summary: package.json, tsconfig.json, next.config.ts(serverExternalPackages+bodySizeLimit), jest.config.ts(setupFilesAfterEnv), postcss.config.mjs, eslint.config.mjs, jest.setup.ts 생성 및 .gitignore에 .env.local 항목 추가

steps.name: app-entry
steps.summary: npm install 완료, src/app/globals.css(Tailwind v4 import), src/app/layout.tsx(lang=ko, #0a0a0a 다크 배경), src/app/page.tsx(캐봄 플레이스홀더) 생성, npm run build 통과

steps.name: test-infra
steps.summary: ts-node 설치, jest.setup.ts 확인, src/__tests__/{lib,api,components}/placeholder.test.ts(x) + RootPage.test.tsx 생성, npm test 4개 통과
